case_title: DALE STURGES VS. SINHAD BEGIC et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-13-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-13-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $1,185.00 RE 28927 FOR TRANSACTION W0611803D004 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO DALE STURGES, DOC #1904172815, WARRANT #38200123, DATED DEC-14-2011

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY STURGES, DALE AS TO DEFENDANT BEGIC, SINHAD DBA NINO'S HARDWOOD FLOORS, INC. BEGIC, ASIM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-13-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED APR-06-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BEGIC, SINHAD DBA NINO'S HARDWOOD FLOORS, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-13-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STURGES, DALE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NINO'S HARDWOOD FLOORS, INC. $1,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,185.00, CLAIMS AGAINST ASIM BEGIC AND SINHAD BEGIC ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CLAIM IS AMENDED TO ADD NINO'S HARDWOOD FLOORS, INC. AS A DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT NINO'S HARDWOOD FLOORS, INC.
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR BY DEFENDANT NINO'S HARDWOOD FLOORS, INC.
CORRESPONDENCE RE:PAYMENT OF CLAIM RECEIVED AND FILED BY PLAINTIFF STURGES, DALE
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS FILED. COPY OF REQUEST GIVEN TO ACCOUNTING DEPT. (RECEIVED VIA MAIL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STURGES, DALE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED APR-06-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BEGIC, ASIM
